_comment: Documented sample — live PSI API quota exhausted at fixture-creation time (HTTP 429 from project_number:583797351490). Schema follows https://developers.google.com/speed/docs/insights/v5/reference/pagespeedapi/runpagespeed#response. All metric values and categories are representative of a real mid-tier site. CLS percentile is intentionally set to the integer-scaled form (10 = 0.10 after ÷100 normalisation) to exercise the normalisation code path. INP is present (280 ms, AVERAGE) to exercise the INP-present path. A separate originLoadingExperience block omits INP entirely to exercise the INP-absent path without FID substitution.

largest-contentful-paint.title: Largest Contentful Paint
largest-contentful-paint.description: Largest Contentful Paint marks the time at which the largest text or image is painted.

first-contentful-paint.title: First Contentful Paint
first-contentful-paint.description: First Contentful Paint marks the time at which the first text or image is painted.

cumulative-layout-shift.title: Cumulative Layout Shift
cumulative-layout-shift.description: CLS measures the movement of visible elements within the viewport.

total-blocking-time.title: Total Blocking Time
total-blocking-time.description: Sum of all time periods between FCP and TTI where task length exceeded 50ms.

interactive.title: Time to Interactive
interactive.description: Time to Interactive is the amount of time it takes for the page to become fully interactive.

speed-index.title: Speed Index
speed-index.description: Speed Index shows how quickly the contents of a page are visibly populated.

server-response-time.title: Initial server response time was short
server-response-time.description: Keep the server response time for the main document short.

unused-javascript.title: Remove unused JavaScript
unused-javascript.description: Reduce unused JavaScript and defer loading scripts until they are required.

render-blocking-resources.title: Eliminate render-blocking resources
render-blocking-resources.description: Resources are blocking the first paint of your page.

is-on-https.title: Uses HTTPS
is-on-https.description: All sites should be protected with HTTPS.

errors-in-console.title: No browser errors logged to the console
errors-in-console.description: Errors logged to the console indicate unresolved problems.

items.description: Uncaught ReferenceError: foo is not defined

image-aspect-ratio.title: Displays images with correct aspect ratio
image-aspect-ratio.description: Image display dimensions should match natural aspect ratio.

image-size-responsive.title: Serves images with appropriate resolution
image-size-responsive.description: Images served that are too large relative to the device resolution.

doctype.title: Page has the HTML doctype
doctype.description: Specifying a doctype prevents the browser from switching to quirks mode.

charset.title: Properly defines charset
charset.description: A character encoding declaration is required.

deprecations.title: Avoids deprecated APIs
deprecations.description: Deprecated APIs will eventually be removed from the browser.

geolocation-on-start.title: Avoids requesting the geolocation permission on page load
geolocation-on-start.description: Users are mistrustful of sites that request geolocation on page load.

notification-on-start.title: Avoids requesting the notification permission on page load
notification-on-start.description: Users are mistrustful of sites that request notifications on page load.

inspector-issues.title: No issues in the Issues panel in Chrome Devtools
inspector-issues.description: Issues logged to the Issues panel in Chrome Devtools indicate possible problems.

valid-source-maps.title: Page has valid source maps
valid-source-maps.description: Source maps correctly map back to the original source code.

paste-preventing-inputs.title: Allows users to paste into input fields
paste-preventing-inputs.description: Preventing input field paste is unexpected and should be avoided.
